---
title: "messageTier()"
description: "Look up the tier number for a message type."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Look up the tier number for a message type.

## Import

```ts
import { messageTier } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Signature

```ts
function messageTier(t: MessageType): number
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `t` | `MessageType` | One of the closed-set protocol message tags. |

## Returns

The tier assigned by the compile-time tier table.

## Example

```ts
messageTier("DATA"); // 3
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/protocol/messages.ts`
